title: Bitter Kale Delight
description: A Moroccan-inspired dish featuring bitter kale with a creamy base and energy-boosting flavors for an energizing start to the day.

ingredients.name: Cashews (optional)
ingredients.notes: For nut-free option, replace with a dash of ground fennel or caraway seeds

instructions: Heat ghee in a pan over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and sauté until fragrant.
Add onion and cook until translucent, then add garlic and continue to cook for another minute.
Stir in turmeric powder and cashews (if using), cooking for 1-2 minutes until slightly browned.
Gently fold in the sliced Chinese cabbage. Cook for about 5 minutes or until wilted but still crunchy.
Add lemon juice and honey/syrup, stirring to combine. Let simmer for an additional 3-4 minutes until the sauce has thickened a bit.
Sprinkle saffron threads over the top if using.
